items.title: Canadian Gov't Minister In Charge Of Trade With U.S. Says U.S-Canada Trade Talks Were Successful Positive And Substantial; Principal Areas For Potential U.S.-Canada Trade Deals Would Be Steel, Aluminum And Energy; Canada Hopes To Conclude Deals In These Sectors Quickly, And Then Extend Agreements To Other Sectors Later; Says He Is Happy After The Talks With Trump, We Have Not Completed Our Work; Says Trump Acknowledged The Difficulty For Trade Negotiations Between Two Highly Integrated Economies
Trump Sparks A 2025 IPO Boom: 5 New Stocks Have Rallied Over 400%
items.description: Trump's second term is fueling an IPO comeback, with 2025 listings up 50% and five stocks already soaring over 400% post-debut.
